name: Kajota Coach Agent
description: An AI commerce agent for African micro-distributors (cosellers). Snap a product photo and it analyzes the image, matches a category, anchors a fair price from comparable listings, drafts a description, and translates it to the seller's language — then proposes an on-chain co-sell listing settled trustlessly via the Kajota Mesh contracts (CosellRegistry + CosellEscrow) on Mantle. The agent never submits a transaction itself; the seller signs with their own embedded wallet, so commission terms become enforceable by math, not bookkeeping.
